channel.title: Collectible Cars on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO Icons Vespa 125 Scooter Vintage Italian Iconic Model Building Kit Home Decor Display Set for Adults Relaxing Creative Hobbies Gift Idea for Men Women Husband Wife Him or Her 10298
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Icons Vespa 125 Scooter Vintage Italian Iconic Model Building Kit Home Decor Display Set for Adults Relaxing Creative Hobbies Gift Idea for Men Women Husband Wife Him or Her 10298 here: ℹ️: Features a front wheel mounted on one side, a removable engine cover with a brick-built engine beneath, plus working steering This LEGO model building kit for adults to build also includes a helmet and an accessories basket with a flower bouquet to complete Number of Pieces: 1106 To celebrate Vespas 75th anniversary, LEGO designers worked with the Piaggio team to create a model to appeal to lovers of Italian culture Presented in pastel blue, one of the Vespa’s original production colours and an extremely rare LEGO colour designed to appeal to LEGO fans With its functioning kickstand, this LEGO scooter model can be placed on display in the home or office, and makes a fab gift for men, women, him or her Assemble your own displayable, 2-seat LEGO Vespa 125 scooter model of an Italian icon with this LEGO building set for adults Finishing touches include the Vespa logo, a classic 1960s Italian licence plate, a spare wheel, and a functioning kickstand 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions 2 Fast 2 Furious Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 Set Race Car Toy Model Building Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Boys & Girls with Racer Minifigure Collectible Gift for Kids 76917
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Speed Champions 2 Fast 2 Furious Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 Set Race Car Toy Model Building Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Boys & Girls with Racer Minifigure Collectible Gift for Kids 76917 at the following link: ℹ️: LEGO Speed Champions and Fast and Furious fans will appreciate the impressive wheel arches and the nitro fuel canister on the passenger seat Inspired by the real-life version, the toy race car model features iconic stripes on the side, a wing at the back and a grille on the front This ultra-sleek LEGO Speed Champions 2023 set includes a Brian O’Conner minifigure for kids to place behind the wheel of the race car model Car lovers can experience a rewarding build before proudly displaying this collectible toy car or recreating epic racing scenes from the movie Fast and Furious fans can relive thrilling moments from the 2 Fast 2 Furious movie with this LEGO Nissan Skyline GT-R (R34) model car building kit This LEGO Speed Champions collectible model car building kit for kids provides children with an awesome introduction to the world of engineering Fans of the epic movie franchise will love this model car building kit as a Fast and Furious themed birthday gift for 9-plus-year-old boys and girls 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Technic Liebherr Crawler Crane LR 13000 Set Build the Ultimate Remote Controlled Construction Vehicle with Control+ App Winch System and Luffing Jib Large Model for Adults Men Women 42146
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Liebherr Crawler Crane LR 13000 Set Build the Ultimate Remote Controlled Construction Vehicle with Control+ App Winch System and Luffing Jib Large Model for Adults Men Women 42146 here: ℹ️: Number of Pieces: 2,883 Explore tank steering, rotating turntable, luffing jib, winch, load-sensing features and 24 weight elements that provide over 0.9 kg of counterweight This impressive LEGO Technic remote control set of one of the world’s most powerful cranes is one of the largest models in the LEGO Technic range Download the LEGO Technic CONTROL+ app for remote control to take charge of the model crane, plus see vehicle stats and try challenges This large LEGO Technic construction set for adults provides a rewarding build with a detailed model to explore and makes a great gift for fans of mighty construction vehicles Recreate one of the worlds most powerful cranes with this LEGO Technic Liebherr Crawler Crane LR 13000, featuring LEGO Technic Control+ technology This model kit for adults to build features a large model crane with 2 smart hubs and 6 large motors - 12 LR AA batteries (not included) are required 🛒 Buy it now!
